ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., public, private, community college) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Current accreditation status (e.g., accredited, provisional) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students currently enrolled */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members */,
  "website" TEXT /* Institution's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the student is enrolled in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Expected graduation year */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Student's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Student's gender */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Student's ethnicity */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Student's citizenship status */,
  "address" TEXT /* Student's home address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Student's phone number */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Student's current GPA */,
  "academic_standing" TEXT /* Student's academic standing (e.g., good standing, probation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degree_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree program */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of degree program (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "tuition_fee" TEXT /* Annual tuition fee for the program */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Text describing the admission requirements */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "program_director_name" TEXT /* Name of the program director */,
  "program_director_email" TEXT /* Email of the program director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the degree program the major belongs to */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "major_type" TEXT /* Type of major (e.g., arts, sciences, humanities) */,
  "major_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the major */,
  "recommended_courses" TEXT /* List of recommended courses for the major */,
  "major_requirements" TEXT /* Text describing the major requirements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the degree program the student is enrolled in */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date the student is expected to graduate */,
  "credits_completed" INTEGER /* Number of credits completed by the student */,
  "gpa_in_major" TEXT /* GPA in the major */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current enrollment status (e.g., active, suspended, graduated) */,
  "adviser_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic adviser */,
  "adviser_email" TEXT /* Email of the academic adviser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES degree_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_catalog" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the degree program the course belongs to */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "instructor_email" TEXT /* Email of the instructor */,
  "class_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the class (e.g., MWF 9:00-10:15 AM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_courses" (
  "student_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who took the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course taken */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade earned by the student */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course was taken */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic term the course was taken */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Credits earned for the course */,
  "final_project" TEXT /* Description of the final project (if applicable) */,
  "instructor_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the instructor */,
  "class_size" INTEGER /* Number of students in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES course_catalog ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES academic_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degree_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree requirement */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the degree program the requirement belongs to */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the requirement */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., course, experiential) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the requirement */,
  "required_courses" TEXT /* List of required courses */,
  "experiential_requirements" TEXT /* List of experiential requirements (e.g., internships, projects) */,
  "min_credits_required" INTEGER /* Minimum number of credits required to fulfill the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic term */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the term belongs to */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  "term_type" TEXT /* Type of the term (e.g., semester, quarter) */,
  "current_term" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if it is the current term */,
  "total_students_enrolled" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the term */,
  "total_courses_offered" INTEGER /* Total number of courses offered in the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)
